sources.category: 現在不能買，但值得等買點名單

raw_row.布局建議: 等待財報公布後、預期差與下一季指引明朗後再伺機買進
raw_row.追蹤指標: HBM4進度、客戶長約鎖定程度、DRAM合約價
raw_row.風險: 財報符合預期但未能大幅超越極高預期，引發利多出盡(Sell the news)

missing_evidence: 未執行完整公司財報、法說、交易所公告與估值模型查核
需以交易所/公司公告/券商即時報價複核 NotebookLM 來源主張
技術觸發價與風控距離多來自來源文字，尚未以獨立圖表系統驗證
等待買點標的尚未觸發進場條件，模型投組預設 0%

portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; model portfolio remains cash for this name until evidence clears
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Reassess only after source triggers and independent evidence are verified
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: No model position opened in this batch artifact
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: If source thesis or price trigger fails, remain watch-only/not decision-ready
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk because model size is 0%
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily source/price check while in KOL/news candidate set
